title: Eye pain documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.

source.title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report
source.population: People undergoing dry-eye symptom screening, diagnosis, subtype assessment, differential diagnosis, or monitoring.
source.setting: Ocular-surface symptom assessment and eye-care diagnostic evaluation.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected dry-eye symptom, diagnostic-test, ocular-surface, eyelid, and contact-lens context. It does not support primary-care autonomous diagnosis, treatment, medicine, referral urgency, fixed follow-up, or UAE service pathways.

exact_location.heading: Differential diagnosis, visual asthenopia, and contact lenses

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports screen-related visual discomfort, pain or photophobia as differential context, and contact-lens-associated dry-eye context without treatment instructions.

assessment.text: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.
assessment.rationale: Supports severe pain, nausea, vomiting, pain on movement, pupil and vision-change urgency context for eye pain; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidance for Professional Practice Annex 4: Urgency of referrals table
source.population: People with eye presentations requiring emergency, urgent, or priority referral triage.
source.exclusions: Exact for listed eye red flags and urgency categories; local UAE referral pathways and timing require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Annex 4 — visual loss and other urgent presentations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

assessment.text: Supports screen-related visual discomfort, pain or photophobia as differential context, and contact-lens-associated dry-eye context without treatment instructions.
assessment.rationale: Supports pain and photophobia differential context for eye pain; no decision is generated.
